escalation.rationale: Joint Russia-Belarus nuclear exercises overseen by Putin and Lukashenko coincide with heightened Iran-US tensions and Israeli-Lebanese ceasefire violations.

ticker_items: Putin, Lukashenko monitor joint nuclear drills via videolink
Iran hardens stance on uranium enrichment in US talks
Israeli airstrikes kill 8 in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
Pentagon withdraws thousands of troops from Eastern Europe
Pakistan deploys military aid to Saudi Arabia under treaty

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drone strike killed two people in southwestern Russia
Ukrainian drone strike killed two people in Russia's southwestern Samara region.
Ukraine claims to have wiped out 100 Russian soldiers in single strike on air defence system.

middle_east.description: Israeli air attacks killed at least eight people in southern Lebanon
Hezbollah drone explosion wounded four Israeli soldiers, one seriously
Israeli air attacks killed at least eight people in southern Lebanon.
Four Israeli soldiers wounded, one seriously, in Hezbollah drone explosion.

claimed_totals.figure: 3,468 dead in Iran, 3,042 dead in Lebanon, 28 killed in Gulf states

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll

russia.text: These weapons are an extreme measure of last resort
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

middle_east.text: If we don't get the right answers, it goes very quickly. We're all ready to go
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Any new U.S. military strike on the country would expand the war beyond the Middle East
middle_east.speaker: IRGC
middle_east.title: Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps

middle_east.text: A deal allowing Iran nuclear weapons is a bad deal
middle_east.speaker: Michael Leiter
middle_east.title: Israel's Ambassador to the US

observers.description: Xi Jinping hosted Putin in Beijing for two-day summit marking 25th anniversary of cooperation treaty. Bilateral trade exceeded $240 billion in 2025 as China deepens strategic partnership with Russia.
Norway seeks to lead a 'Viking Bloc' of northern European nations to contain Russia. The initiative aims to coordinate regional defense efforts among well-positioned Nordic and Baltic states.
Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops, fighter jet squadron, and Chinese-made air defense system to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in early April according to Reuters report.
UK condemned Russia's nuclear rhetoric and RS-28 Sarmat missile testing at OSCE. Also criticized systematic POW mistreatment and lack of Russian accountability for war crimes.

financial.notes: Iran imposing fees on subsea internet cables in Strait of Hormuz, targeting global financial communications infrastructure.
